description_long: This is a short section of a picket fence, featuring five vertical pickets with pointed tops. Four of the pickets are a natural wood color, while the picket on the far right is painted black, creating a striking visual contrast. The pickets are connected by two horizontal rails, one near the top and one near the bottom, both matching the wood tone of the majority of the pickets. The fence has a simple, utilitarian design with no visible decorative elements or ornate features. The pointed tops of the pickets add a classic touch, commonly seen in residential and suburban settings. The structure appears to be made primarily of wood, with the possibility of some metal fasteners not visible in the images.
description: A five-picket wooden fence section with pointed tops, featuring one black picket and two horizontal rails. The design is simple and classic, with a strong color contrast.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five pickets, with the rightmost picket painted black and the rest in wood color.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the fence and the black picket at the front edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal rails and the black picket now on the left side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thin profile, with the wood-colored pickets in front.
